title: tsaddiyq #6662
definition:
1) just, lawful, righteous
    1a) just, righteous (in government)
    1b) just, right (in one's cause)
    1c) just, righteous (in conduct and character)
    1d) righteous (as justified and vindicated by God)
    1e) right, correct, lawful
